title: Guardians
intro: Guardians are powerful companions that fight alongside you. Each character can have up to three guardians — one of each type — but only **one guardian can be active at a time**. You choose which guardian to deploy based on your current needs.
intro2: Guardian progress is **permanent**: switching your active guardian never resets the levels of the others. Every guardian you have leveled stays at that level until you level it further.

figure.alt: Guardian selection panel showing Attack, Defense, and Support guardians
figure.caption: The Guardian panel — three guardian slots, each with its own level and EXP bar.

cells: Offensive companion — focuses on dealing damage to enemies.
Boosting kill speed during solo grinding.
Tanking tougher zones or boss fights.
Utility companion — provides buffs and healing assistance.
Sustaining long farming sessions or group play.

howItWorks.title: Leveling Your Guardian
steps: **Gain EXP automatically** — guardian EXP accumulates passively over time while you are online and farming. No manual action required.
**Reach the EXP threshold** — each guardian displays its current EXP progress (e.g. 0 / 100). Once the bar fills, the guardian is ready to level up.
**Pay Gold Bars (GB)** — leveling up costs Gold Bars. The cost scales with the guardian's current level.
**Enjoy stronger stats** — each level increases the guardian's contribution to your combat effectiveness.

infoBoxes.label: Switching Guardians
infoBoxes.body: You can freely switch between your three guardians at any time using the **Activate** button in the Guardian panel. The previously active guardian becomes inactive but **retains its level** — there is no penalty for switching.

infoBoxes.label: Gold Bars
infoBoxes.body: Gold Bars (GB) are the premium currency used to upgrade guardians. They can be earned through gameplay — convert Adena to GB using the GM Shop > Consumables.
